eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: St. Clair, AL; at 9:26 AM on JUN 5, 2026 Effective until 12:26 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: If you are receiving this message, you are asked to evacuate immediately as a precaution until further notice. You will be notified when it is safe to return home.  There is a tanker truck overturned, and it has potentially harmful material inside. Evacuate Immediately until further notice
